縮放校驗 · Scale-Fix Verification

All five clips re-harvested on the smoothed sword-length curve (rigid-feature measurement, outlier rejection, no pose assumptions). Source zooms up to 2.1× were corrected. Heavy is excluded — it awaits your re-roll approval for the jump-cut recovery.

一劍 light

上格 deflect

遊龍 dash

登雲 jump

起劍 entry

One honest residual: the dash (and mildly the jump) CROUCH frames still read slightly large — in a deep crouch the blade angles toward the camera, measures short, and under-corrects; the hair measure also fails there. Options: (a) timelines simply skip/shorten the crouch frames (they're ~6 frames of 97; the crouch is a transition blink) — cheapest, recommended · (b) I engineer a sword+head fusion measure — another pass, uncertain gain.
